description: Multi-tenant cloud PBX management system built on Asterisk and Kamailio

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Main system overview for super administrators

elements.label: Total Tenants
elements.description: Number of registered tenant organizations

elements.label: Total Extensions
elements.description: Number of SIP extension accounts across all tenants

elements.label: Active Calls
elements.description: Real-time count of ongoing phone calls

elements.label: Call Volume (30 days)
elements.description: Bar chart showing call volume trends over the last 30 days

elements.label: Call Disposition
elements.description: Pie chart showing answered vs missed vs failed calls

elements.label: Peak Hours
elements.description: Chart showing busiest calling hours

pages.name: Tenants List
pages.description: List of all tenant organizations with search and creation

elements.label: Tenants table
elements.description: Table listing all tenants with name, domain, extension count, status

elements.label: Create Tenant
elements.description: Opens dialog to create a new tenant organization

pages.name: Tenant Details
pages.description: Detailed view of a single tenant with multiple management tabs

tabs.name: Info
tabs.description: Basic tenant information: name, slug, domain, SIP domain, max extensions limit, creation date

tabs.name: Extensions
tabs.description: SIP accounts / phone extensions. Table with columns: extension number, display name, SIP password, status (online/offline). Has a Create Extension button (id: create-extension-btn) to add new SIP accounts

tabs.name: Trunks
tabs.description: SIP trunks for outbound calling via external providers. Table with trunk name, host, port, status. Has Create Trunk button (id: create-trunk-btn)

tabs.name: Events
tabs.description: Audit log showing all administrative actions performed on this tenant. Shows: timestamp, user, action type, details. Useful for tracking who made changes

tabs.name: Reports
tabs.description: Call statistics and analytics for this tenant. Charts showing call volume, peak hours, and call duration distribution

tabs.name: Inbound Rules
tabs.description: DID (phone number) routing rules. Configure which incoming phone numbers route to which extensions or groups. Supports time-based routing

tabs.name: Call Routes
tabs.description: Outbound call routing patterns. Define which trunk to use for different number patterns (e.g., international calls via trunk A, local calls via trunk B)

tabs.name: Users
tabs.description: Web panel user accounts for this tenant. Manage who can log in to the admin panel. Has Create User button (id: create-user-btn). Each user has a role and can be linked to an extension

tabs.name: IP ACL
tabs.description: Per-tenant IP Access Control List. Whitelist specific IP addresses that are allowed to access this tenant's resources

pages.name: Active Calls
pages.description: Real-time list of ongoing phone calls

elements.label: Active calls table
elements.description: Shows caller number, callee number, duration, codec, call state. Auto-refreshes every 5 seconds

elements.label: Hangup
elements.description: Terminate an active call

pages.name: CDR History
pages.description: Call Detail Records — full history of all phone calls

elements.label: Date range filter
elements.description: Filter calls by start and end date

elements.label: Number filter
elements.description: Search by caller or callee number

elements.label: Disposition filter
elements.description: Filter by call result: answered, no answer, busy, failed

elements.label: CDR table
elements.description: Table with: date/time, source number, destination number, duration, disposition, recording

elements.label: Export CSV
elements.description: Download all filtered records as a CSV file

pages.name: IP Access
pages.description: Global IP address management for security

elements.label: IP Whitelist
elements.description: Global whitelist — IPs added here are immune from rate limiting and blocking

elements.label: IP Blacklist
elements.description: Manually blocked IP addresses that cannot access the system

elements.label: Add IP
elements.description: Add a new IP address to whitelist or blacklist

pages.name: My Dashboard
pages.description: Personal dashboard for extension users (non-admin). Shows the user's own extension info, recent calls, and call statistics

pages.name: My Calls
pages.description: Personal call history for extension users. Same as CDR but filtered to only show the user's own calls

elements.label: Username
elements.description: Current user's login name

elements.label: Role
elements.description: User's role in the system

elements.label: Account creation date
elements.description: When the account was created

elements.label: Language
elements.description: Switch interface language between English and Ukrainian

elements.label: Timezone
elements.description: Set preferred timezone for displaying dates and times

pages.name: Tenant Settings
pages.description: Advanced settings for a specific tenant

pages.name: WebRTC Softphone
pages.description: Built-in browser-based phone (WebRTC). Located at the bottom of the sidebar — click the phone icon to open. Allows making and receiving calls directly from the browser. Requires SIP credentials from the Extensions tab (extension number, SIP password, and WebSocket URI). The softphone panel slides out from the sidebar.
